ai_summary: Alembic Pharmaceuticals Limited has received final USFDA approval for its Abbreviated New Drug Application (ANDA) for Dapsone Gel, 5%, a generic equivalent of Almirall's Aczone Gel used to treat acne. This approval enables Alembic to launch a new product in the U.S. market, potentially enhancing its revenue streams and strengthening its presence in the dermatology segment. No red flags are identified in this positive regulatory development.
